revision.text:
'''庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年==
==庚戌の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうきんのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚戌の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{庚戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚戌]]

{{干支}} '''庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうきんのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚戌の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:庚戌]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:庚戌]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。

==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうきんのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうきんのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Dog also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 庚戌'''（かのえいぬ、こうきんのいぬ、こうじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの47番目で、前は[[己酉]]、次は[[辛亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って50が余る年が庚戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[50年]] *[[110年]][[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] *[[170年]] *[[230年]] *[[290年]] *[[350年]] *[[410年]] *[[470年]] *[[530年]] *[[590年]] *[[650年]] *[[710年]] *[[770年]] *[[830年]] *[[890年]] *[[950年]] | *[[1010年]] *[[1070年]] *[[1130年]] *[[1190年]] *[[1250年]] *[[1310年]] *[[1370年]] *[[1430年]] *[[1490年]] *[[1550年]] *[[1610年]] *[[1670年]] *[[1730年]] *[[1790年]] *[[1850年]] *[[1910年]] *[[1970年]] | *[[2030年]] *[[2090年]] *[[2150年]] *[[2210年]] *[[2270年]] *[[2330年]] *[[2390年]] *[[2450年]] *[[2510年]] *[[2570年]] *[[2630年]] *[[2690年]] *[[2750年]] *[[2810年]] *[[2870年]] *[[2930年]] *[[2990年]] |}
==庚戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[9月]]が庚戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚戌の日== ===選日=== なし ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qq '''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dog== === Selected Day (選日) === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga '''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang '''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Dog (庚戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: koushu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dog== === Selected Day (選日) === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dog== === Selected Day (選日) === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang '''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал '''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Cold Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo [[:en:Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: koushu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất
