==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dog==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
None.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}}) as applicable.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe ==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}}) as applicable.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dog==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
None.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Earth generates Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Dog (庚戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: koushu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Dog==

None.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Earth generates Metal).

***Onyomi 1: koushu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongsul (경술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tuất

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dog|kanji=庚戌|romaji=kanoe inu|onyomi=kōjutsu|p=gēngxū|w=keng-hsü|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ɕy|y=geng1 seot1|j=geng1 seot1|ci=kɪŋ sœt̚|mc=kæŋ syt|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ʔsuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Dog also known as 庚戌''' (kanoe inu (庚戌), koukin no inu (庚戌), koujutsu (庚戌)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 47th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|己酉|lt=Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shingai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|lt=Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shingai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Dog (zodiac)|en|Dog (zodiac)|WD=Q755126|lt=Dog (戌)|1=Dog (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth ==Months of Yang Metal Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Jin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kou-Inu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
